//: The ttsc/Go lowering-emit stage of the publish build (scripts/build-package.ts `ttscProject`): the @rhombus-std/primitives.transformer ttsc plugin (a Go sidecar) rewrites each `nameof<T>()` call to its derived token string (and elides the consumed import) while emitting per-file JS into .ttsc-out/, which `bun build` then bundles into dist/. It lowers each `nameof` to exactly the token a hand-written call would carry. Typecheck/lint stay on plain tsc (typescript 5): `nameof` typechecks as an ordinary string-returning function.
